goals.title: Install DietrichGebert/ponytail globally for Codex and verify it with...
goals.objective: Install DietrichGebert/ponytail globally for Codex and verify it with command/file/plugin evidence. Then improve PathFinder AI GraphRAG analysis flow in C:\Users\SSAFY\Desktop\t08_project using minimal clean code: relevant KG fact retrieval instead of all facts, taxonomy-backed study/interview context, backend result normalization/evidence traceability, removal or replacement of fake frontend scores, and preservation of private-data separation. Follow omo:ulw-loop, keep trihead as token-efficiency layer, prefer Git Bash MCP and CodeGraph, do RED->GREEN tests before production changes, run API/UI surface QA with cleanup receipts, and do not commit without explicit user approval.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data surface: run codex plugin marketplace add DietrichGebert/ponytail; then capture codex plugin/help output, plugin cache/config file listing, and hooks/plugin metadata paths into .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/ponytail-install.txt. PASS if command exits 0 or already-installed is explicit, Ponytail marketplace/plugin files are locatable, and any interactive hook-trust blocker is named exactly.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/ponytail-install.txt with command transcript, file listing, README citation, and cleanup:none
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: C001 PASS: codex plugin list shows ponytail@ponytail installed, enabled 4.8.3; cache path C:/Users/SSAFY/.codex/plugins/cache/ponytail/ponytail/4.8.3; plugin metadata and hooks file present; global config was backed up before mutation; artifacts: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/ponytail-install.txt and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/ponytail-status-final.txt; cleanup:none; note: an attempted PowerShell record-evidence command failed with exit 1, then Git Bash MCP succeeded.

successCriteria.scenario: Backend/API surface: first run a targeted pytest that fails because build_llm_payload includes irrelevant approved KG facts and empty taxonomy context; then implement minimal retrieval/taxonomy logic; rerun targeted tests and a Django APIClient or curl-equivalent POST /api/analyze/ scenario that proves only relevant facts plus study/interview context are in the LLM payload.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/graphrag-red-green.txt and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/api-surface.txt with RED failure, GREEN pass, API payload assertions, cleanup receipt
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED captured: trihead pytest evidence shows 3 intended failures: irrelevant KG fact still included, taxonomy study areas/interview stages empty, normalize_llm_result missing. Raw pytest fallback also captured but Korean output is mojibake, so trihead compact output is primary. Artifacts: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/graphrag-red-trihead.txt, .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/graphrag-red-raw.txt

successCriteria.scenario: Regression/UI surface: run frontend build/test plus Playwright analyze-flow/result-page scenario that verifies preparation categories, question, evidence/source, study goal render, and no fake hash score is presented as user ability. Also rerun private marker regression ensuring cover letter/job posting markers do not enter public KG facts/chunks.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/ui-regression.txt with frontend command transcript/screenshot path and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/private-regression.txt with backend test output and cleanup receipt

plan.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
